section.title: Step 1: Remove legacy tools
section.p: Action: Drop black, isort, flake8, autoflake, pyupgrade from dev-deps.

section.title: Step 2: Add Ruff config
section.p: Action: Add [tool.ruff] with target-version, line-length, lint.select.

section.title: Step 3: Add mypy strict
section.p: Action: Add [tool.mypy] strict = true; override per legacy module.

section.title: Step 4: Add coverage gate
section.p: Action: Add --cov, --cov-fail-under to pyproject pytest config.

section.title: Step 5: Add bandit
section.p: Action: Enable ruff S rules or add bandit to pre-commit.

section.title: Step 7: Wire CI
section.p: Action: Add CI job that runs pre-commit run --all-files.
Output: Same gate locally and in CI.
